title: Fuselage – Inner Flange Glare Frames – Inspection
text:
Explanatory Statement for
Absence of AD document
At this time, there are no Airbus A400M aeroplanes in civil service.
For this reason, no publicly available AD document exists and this AD record (ADR) is created for
information only. The content is only made available by EASA to the concerned design approval
holder(s) and competent military airworthiness authorities, represented by CQC. The AD content
is understood to be a recommendation to the affected military authorities to issue their own AD.
The ‘applicable AD’ for this subject, containing the legally valid requirements for the military
aeroplane(s), is the document issued by the responsible military authority, depending on the
country where the affected aeroplane is registered.
For a copy of the applicable (military) AD, contact the responsible military authority.
The list of CQC AD recommendations is available here for download, under EXPERT AREA.
